schema.description: Extracts structured fields from inbound invoice emails

vendor_name.description: Name of the company or individual sending the invoice

invoice_number.description: Invoice reference number or ID (e.g. INV-2024-001)

total_amount.description: Total amount due as a numeric value, no currency symbol

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, etc.)

due_date.description: Payment due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

issue_date.description: Date the invoice was issued in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

payment_terms.description: Payment terms if stated (e.g. 'Net 30', 'Due on receipt')

line_items.description: Individual line items on the invoice

description.description: Description of the product or service

vendor_email.description: Vendor's billing or contact email address

purchase_order_number.description: PO number if referenced in the invoice
